title: NeuroMM-2026 Challenge — Track 3 NMM-Source-IED Post Evaluation
description:
Track 3 (NMM-Source-IED): 5-class localization of the epileptogenic region — combine pre-extracted synchronized visual context features with physiological signals to localize the seizure focus. Result-only submission: upload predictions over the released candidate set; only the hidden official Track-3 samples are scored. Primary metric: Weighted-F1.

The competitive phase has concluded. This platform is open for a limited time strictly for ablation studies; these subsequent results will not be included in the official leaderboard rankings.
description_zh:
轨道3 (NMM-Source-IED)：癫痫致痫区的5分类定位——结合预提取的同步视觉上下文特征与生理信号来定位发作焦点。仅结果提交：上传预测结果至公开候选集；仅隐藏的官方轨道3样本被评分。主要指标：加权F1。

竞争阶段已结束。该平台在有限时间内开放，严格用于消融研究；这些后续结果将不被纳入官方排行榜排名。

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
# NeuroMM-2026 Challenge — Track 3: NMM-Source-IED Post Evaluation

Welcome to **Track 3 (NMM-Source-IED)** of the NeuroMM-2026 multimodal
neurophysiological intelligence challenge.

The competitive phase has concluded. This platform is open for a limited time strictly for ablation studies; these subsequent results will not be included in the official leaderboard rankings.


### NMM-Source-IED
- Primary metric: Weighted-F1
- Focus: 5-class localization of epileptogenic regions

Combine visual context features with physiological signals to localize the
seizure focus.

## Task

**5-class classification**: for each sample, predict the epileptogenic-region
class (an integer in **{1, 2, 3, 4, 5}**). Track 3 **encourages teams to
combine the pre-extracted synchronized visual context features with the
physiological signals (EEG/EMG/ECG)** to localize the seizure focus.

## Data

Apply for access and download the dataset from:

> <https://huggingface.co/datasets/NeuroMM/NeuroMM-2026>

The dataset contains the **training set**, the **validation set**, and the
**candidate set** (which contains the Track-3 test samples mixed with
distractors). The candidate set is intentionally larger than the official
Track-3 set and **you are not told which samples are scored** — predict for
*every* id in the released candidate set and submit all of them; the scorer
automatically keeps only the official hidden Track-3 samples and ignores the
rest.

## Registration Rules

- One person may participate in **only one team**.
- A team may enter multiple tracks, but for **each track only one team
  member's account** may make submissions.
- The email used to register on **Codabench must match the email** filled in
  the HuggingFace dataset-access request form; otherwise the registration
  **will not be approved**. All registrations are manually reviewed by the
  organizers.

## Submission

This competition accepts **prediction results only**. You upload a single
prediction file (packaged in a ZIP) — no code or model submission is
required. See the **Evaluation** page for the exact format.

## Ranking

Submissions are ranked by **Weighted-F1** (the support-weighted average of
the per-class F1 over the 5 classes). This is the **only** metric — no other
metric is computed, reported, or shown.
pages.content_zh:
# NeuroMM-2026 挑战赛 — 赛道 3：NMM-Source-IED 后评估

欢迎参加 **NeuroMM-2026 多模态神经生理智能挑战赛** **赛道 3（NMM-Source-IED）**。

竞争阶段已结束。该平台在有限时间内开放，严格用于消融研究；这些后续结果将不纳入官方排行榜排名。

### NMM-Source-IED
- 主要指标：加权 F1 值
- 重点：癫痫病灶区域的 5 分类定位

结合视觉上下文特征与生理信号来定位癫痫灶。

## 任务

**5 分类**：对于每个样本，预测癫痫病灶区域类别（整数，范围为 **{1, 2, 3, 4, 5}**）。赛道 3 **鼓励团队结合预提取的同步视觉上下文特征与生理信号（脑电图/肌电图/心电图）** 来定位癫痫灶。

## 数据

从以下网址申请访问权限并下载数据集：

> <https://huggingface.co/datasets/NeuroMM/NeuroMM-2026>

该数据集包含 **训练集**、**验证集** 和 **候选集**（包含混合了干扰项的赛道 3 测试样本）。候选集故意设置得比官方赛道 3 集合更大，**不会告知您哪些样本会被计分** — 请对发布的候选集中的所有 id 进行预测并提交所有结果；计分器将自动仅保留官方隐藏的赛道 3 样本，忽略其余部分。

## 注册规则

- 一个人只能参加 **一个团队**。
- 一个团队可参加多个赛道，但对于 **每个赛道，只有一个团队成员的账户** 可进行提交。
- 在 **Codabench 上注册的电子邮件必须与** HuggingFace 数据集访问请求表单中填写的电子邮件 **匹配**；否则注册将 **不被批准**。所有注册由组织者手动审核。

## 提交

本竞赛仅接受 **预测结果**。您上传单个预测文件（打包为 ZIP 格式）— 不需要提交代码或模型。详见 **评估** 页面了解确切格式。

## 排名

提交成果按 **加权 F1 值**（5 个类别的按支持度加权平均的每类 F1）排名。这是 **唯一的** 指标 — 不计算、报告或显示其他指标。

pages.title: Evaluation
pages.content:
# Evaluation

## Metric

**Weighted-F1** — the support-weighted average of the per-class F1 over the
5 classes (`scikit-learn` `f1_score(average='weighted')`). This is the
**only** metric; no other metric is produced, reported, or shown. Higher is
better.

## Submission format

Submit a **ZIP** file containing exactly one file named **`submission.csv`**:

```
sample_submission.zip
└── submission.csv
```

> Only the file name `submission.csv` is accepted. Any other name
> (e.g. `prediction.csv`) will cause the submission to fail.

`submission.csv` has two columns:

```csv
sample_id,prediction
NMM26-XXXXXXXX,3
NMM26-YYYYYYYY,1
NMM26-ZZZZZZZZ,5
```

- `sample_id` — the id exactly as given in the released candidate set.
- `prediction` — the predicted **class as an integer in {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}**
  (the epileptogenic-region class). One class per sample.

### Important

- Predict for **every** id in the released candidate set and include them all.
  You are **not** told which ids are the official Track-3 samples.
- The scorer keeps only the hidden official Track-3 ids and **silently
  ignores every other row** (distractors / other tracks). Extra rows are
  fine.
- A submission **fails** if any official Track-3 sample has no prediction, if
  predictions are non-numeric, if `sample_id` is duplicated, or if the file
  is not named `submission.csv`.
pages.content_zh:
# 评估

## 指标

**加权F1** — 5个类别的每类F1的支持度加权平均值（`scikit-learn` `f1_score(average='weighted')`）。这是**唯一的**指标；不产生、报告或显示其他指标。数值越高越好。

## 提交格式

提交一个**ZIP**文件，其中恰好包含一个名为**`submission.csv`**的文件：

```
sample_submission.zip
└── submission.csv
```

> 仅接受文件名`submission.csv`。任何其他名称（例如`prediction.csv`）都将导致提交失败。

`submission.csv`有两列：

```csv
sample_id,prediction
NMM26-XXXXXXXX,3
NMM26-YYYYYYYY,1
NMM26-ZZZZZZZZ,5
```

- `sample_id` — 与发布的候选集中给定的id完全相同。
- `prediction` — 预测的**类别为整数{1, 2, 3, 4, 5}**（癫痫灶区域类别）。每个样本一个类别。

### 重要事项

- 为发布的候选集中的**每个**id进行预测并包括所有id。**不会**告知您哪些id是官方Track-3样本。
- 评分器仅保留隐藏的官方Track-3 id，**以静默方式忽略所有其他行**（干扰项/其他赛道）。额外行没有问题。
- 如果任何官方Track-3样本没有预测、预测不是数字、`sample_id`重复或文件未命名为`submission.csv`，提交**失败**。

pages.title: Terms
pages.content:
# Terms and Conditions

By participating in the NeuroMM-2026 Challenge (Track 3: NMM-Source-IED) you agree to:

- Use the provided data **only** for research and participation in this
  challenge. Redistribution of the data, or any commercial / unauthorized use,
  is prohibited.
- Make predictions with automated machine-learning methods. Manual labeling of
  samples by human inspection of the physiological signals is **not** an
  acceptable methodology and violates the spirit of the challenge.
- Not attempt to de-anonymize samples, identify which candidate ids are the
  scored official samples, or otherwise reverse-engineer the hidden labels.
- Make a reasonable number of submissions (a daily cap is enforced). Abusing
  the evaluation service to probe hidden labels is prohibited.

The organizers may update these rules and the competition schedule when
necessary, and reserve the right to disqualify submissions that violate these
terms.

The dataset is provided under the NeuroMM-2026 data usage policy
(academic research and challenge participation only).
pages.content_zh:
# 条款和条件

参与NeuroMM-2026挑战赛（赛道3：NMM-Source-IED）即表示您同意：

- 提供的数据**仅**用于研究和参加本挑战赛。禁止数据的重新分发或任何商业/未授权使用。
- 使用自动化机器学习方法进行预测。通过人工检查生理信号对样本进行手动标注**不**是可接受的方法，违反了挑战赛的精神。
- 不尝试对样本进行匿名化识别、识别哪些候选者ID是评分的官方样本，或以其他方式对隐藏标签进行逆向工程。
- 进行合理数量的提交（实施每日上限）。禁止滥用评估服务以探测隐藏标签。

组织者可在必要时更新这些规则和比赛时间表，并保留取消违反这些条款的提交资格的权利。

该数据集根据NeuroMM-2026数据使用政策提供（仅限学术研究和挑战赛参与）。
